query:
INSERT INTO tenancyAlerts (tenancyId, alertType, title, description, priority, dueDate, status, createdBy, createdAt)
SELECT 
  t.id,
  CASE 
    WHEN t.id % 4 = 0 THEN 'court_hearing'
    WHEN t.id % 4 = 1 THEN 'rent_arrears'
    WHEN t.id % 4 = 2 THEN 'lease_expiry'
    ELSE 'inspection_due'
  END,
  CASE 
    WHEN t.id % 4 = 0 THEN 'Tenancy Tribunal Hearing'
    WHEN t.id % 4 = 1 THEN 'Rent Payment Overdue'
    WHEN t.id % 4 = 2 THEN 'Lease Expiring Soon'
    ELSE 'Routine Inspection Due'
  END,
  CASE 
    WHEN t.id % 4 = 0 THEN 'Hearing scheduled for noise complaints'
    WHEN t.id % 4 = 1 THEN 'Rent payment is 14 days overdue'
    WHEN t.id % 4 = 2 THEN 'Lease expires in 30 days'
    ELSE '90-day inspection is due next week'
  END,
  CASE 
    WHEN t.id % 4 = 0 THEN 'urgent'
    WHEN t.id % 4 = 1 THEN 'high'
    WHEN t.id % 4 = 2 THEN 'medium'
    ELSE 'low'
  END,
  DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL (t.id % 4 + 1) * 3 DAY),
  'active',
  1,
  NOW()
FROM tenancies t
LIMIT 4;

    WHEN t.id % 4 = 1 THEN 'Rent Payment Overdue'
    WHEN t.id % 4 = 2 THEN 'Lease Expiring Soon'
    ELSE 'Routine Inspection Due'

    WHEN t.id % 4 = 1 THEN 'Rent payment is 14 days overdue'
